violations.detail: Production stages that run `bundle install` should set `ENV BUNDLE_DEPLOYMENT="1"` (or `bundle config set --local deployment 'true'`). Without it, Bundler may mutate `Gemfile.lock` at build time, install gems outside the project, and skip the lockfile-required check — defeating the "the lockfile is the build input" property. No `Gemfile.lock` is observable in the build context — without one, Bundler resolves from `Gemfile` fresh on every build and produces an indeterministic image.
violations.message: Production stage runs bundle install without BUNDLE_DEPLOYMENT=1

suggestedFix.description: Add ENV BUNDLE_DEPLOYMENT="1" to enforce Bundler deployment-mode contract
